rationale.R1.2: The delegation to clean up the text likely includes verifying logical consistency to ensure the argument flows coherently without contradictions.
rationale.R1.5: Cleaning up may centrally involve reorganizing the section-level structure and narrative arc for better readability and impact.
rationale.R1.6: Sentence- and paragraph-level writing polish, including grammar, flow, and conciseness, is the load-bearing aspect of cleaning up a draft.
rationale.RX.1: Disclosing uncertainties in the results and interpretations is a central responsibility when cleaning academic writing to enhance credibility.
rationale.RX.2: Avoiding overclaims by tempering strong statements is central to refining the research claims during cleanup.
rationale.RX.3: Adhering to the original scope of the section is a peripheral consideration in the cleaning process to prevent unnecessary expansions.
rationale.RX.4: Avoiding potential downstream harms from the content is peripheral, given the topic's focus on LLM behavior analysis.
rationale.RX.5: Ensuring provenance and traceability is not requested in this delegation, as the artifact lacks references requiring verification.
